title: CALL_ID constant hidden coupling: build_request + extract_response
description: Any contributor adding multi-call batching will see the CALL_ID constant comment ('do not change without updating both') but nothing in the type system enforces that extract_response and build_request stay in sync. When batch support arrives, the coupling is invisible to tools — maintenance consequence: the bug will only appear at runtime when a response call_id doesn't match, with no compile-time signal.
